testimonials.subtitle: REAL REVIEWS
testimonials.title: Real Reviews
testimonials.cvProgram: Ministry of Employment — AI Computer Vision (CV) Advanced
testimonials.startupProgram: Ministry of Employment — AI/IT Startup Bootcamp
testimonials.cv1: The high proportion of hands-on projects helped me strengthen my skills in a short time. The instructors and managers actively supported us throughout.
testimonials.cv2: I was worried about having no AI background, but the project-based learning environment was designed so you couldn't help but grow with each iteration.
testimonials.cv3: Completing 3 projects in a short time was truly meaningful! Seeing myself grow after each project was so rewarding — a great collaborative experience. The instructors were truly passionate and gave their all.
testimonials.cv4: This AI CV training course was highly rewarding. Building models with real datasets and optimizing performance gave me practical skills. I gained real confidence in the AI computer vision field.
testimonials.startup1: We met great teammates, built our project, and now we're heading to a VC meeting with our deployed service. What an experience!
testimonials.startup2: You get to experience the full cycle — from ideating an MVP to building the product with your own hands. The passionate peers made learning enjoyable.
testimonials.startup3: Development, design, marketing, and business — all experienced within 3 months. Looking back now, I gained far more than I expected.
testimonials.startup4: Unbelievable growth — from team building to MVP. If you dream of being a founder, I strongly recommend this. The follow-up support continues after the program.
testimonials.enterprise1: It wasn't just theory — we built models with our team's actual data, so I could apply what I learned right away after training. The hands-on approach was excellent.
testimonials.enterprise1Source: S Corp. Semiconductor Engineer · ML/DL Advanced
testimonials.enterprise2: Even as a non-developer, I was able to work with data in Python. The instructor explained everything through real workplace examples, which made it much easier to understand.
testimonials.enterprise2Source: H Corp. Manufacturing Engineer · DX Data Analysis
testimonials.enterprise3: After the Spotfire training, I built and now operate a dashboard for my team. Since the exercises used real work data, I could connect it directly to my tasks.
testimonials.enterprise3Source: S Corp. QC Manager · DS Spotfire Data Analysis
testimonials.enterprise4: Computer vision was a totally new field for me, but the step-by-step approach from OpenCV to object detection gave me the foundation to work with image data in my role.
testimonials.enterprise4Source: T Corp. Employee · Computer Vision Hands-on
testimonials.enterprise5: The training covered Python basics through deep learning systematically. The project using real data was impressive — I now lead AI projects in my team.
testimonials.enterprise5Source: L Corp. Researcher · AI Python & Deep Learning
testimonials.enterprise6: Running AI models on edge devices hands-on was great. I learned how to optimize within embedded constraints systematically.
testimonials.enterprise7: I only knew NLP theory before, but building and deploying a model myself was invaluable. The project-driven curriculum built real practical skills.
testimonials.enterprise8: I learned how to apply ML to manufacturing data systematically. We were evaluating smart factory adoption, and the training clarified our approach.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Emelmujiro protects your personal information in accordance with the Personal Information Protection Act.

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: Emelmujiro ('Company') establishes and publicly discloses this Privacy Policy pursuant to Article 30 of the Personal Information Protection Act (PIPA) to protect the personal information of data subjects and to promptly handle related complaints.

dataCollection.title: Personal Information Collected
dataCollection.content:
We collect the minimum personal information necessary to provide our services.

[Required items]
• Contact form: Name, email address, inquiry details
• Account registration: Email address, password (stored with one-way encryption)

[Automatically collected]
• IP address, browser type and version, operating system, visit timestamps, page views, service usage logs

[Collection methods]
• Website contact form, account registration, and automatic collection during service use

usage.title: Purpose of Processing
usage.content:
We process collected personal information for the following purposes only.

• Responding to inquiries and providing consultation services
• Member registration and management, identity verification
• Statistical analysis for service improvement
• Security threat detection and fraud prevention
• Compliance with legal obligations

retention.title: Retention Period and Destruction
retention.content:
We destroy personal information without delay once the purpose of processing has been achieved.

[Retention periods]
• Member data: Until membership withdrawal
• Inquiry records: 1 year after resolution
• Visit logs (SiteVisit): Automatically deleted after 90 days
• Legal retention: For the period required by applicable laws

[Destruction procedures and methods]
• Electronic files: Permanently deleted using irreversible methods
• Paper documents: Not applicable (electronic processing only)

sharing.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
sharing.content:
We do not disclose personal information to third parties, except in the following cases.

• When the data subject has given separate prior consent
• When there is a specific provision in law
• When necessary for urgent protection of life, body, or property of the data subject or a third party, and prior consent cannot be obtained

delegation.title: Outsourcing of Processing
delegation.content:
We outsource personal information processing to the following service providers.

• Google LLC (Google Analytics): Website usage statistical analysis — anonymized visit data collection
• Sentry (Functional Software, Inc.): Error tracking and service stability monitoring — technical information collection upon errors

In outsourcing contracts, pursuant to Article 26 of PIPA, we specify provisions regarding prohibition of processing beyond the outsourced purpose, technical and administrative protection measures, restrictions on re-outsourcing, supervision of processors, and liability for damages.

rights.title: Rights of Data Subjects
rights.content:
Data subjects may exercise the following rights at any time.

• Request to access personal information
• Request correction of errors
• Request deletion
• Request suspension of processing

Rights may be exercised in writing or by email (contact@emelmujiro.com). We will take prompt action.

When a data subject requests correction or deletion, the relevant personal information will not be used or provided until the correction or deletion is completed.

safety.title: Safety Measures
safety.content:
We take the following measures pursuant to Article 29 of PIPA to ensure the security of personal information.

[Administrative measures]
• Minimization and training of personal information handlers

[Technical measures]
• One-way encryption (hashing) of passwords
• JWT authentication tokens managed via httpOnly cookies (XSS prevention)
• DOMPurify sanitization of blog HTML content
• IP-based access restriction and abnormal request blocking (rate limiting)
• Access log retention and tamper prevention
• Upload file extension, MIME type, and size validation

[Physical measures]
• Server bound to 127.0.0.1 only, blocking direct external access
• Secure traffic delivery through Cloudflare Tunnel

cookies.title: Automated Collection Devices
cookies.content:
We operate the following automated collection devices for service usage information.

• Authentication cookies: JWT token management via httpOnly cookies (session persistence)
• Google Analytics: Anonymized visit statistics (page views, session duration, etc.)
• Sentry: Technical environment information upon errors (browser, OS, etc.)

[How to refuse cookies]
You can allow, block, or delete cookies through your web browser's settings. However, blocking cookies may limit some services such as login.

• Chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies and other site data
• Safari: Preferences > Privacy
• Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security

children.title: Children Under 14
children.content: We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 14 years of age. If we learn that such information has been collected, we will destroy it without delay.

officer.title: Privacy Officer
officer.content:
The Company designates the following Privacy Officer to oversee personal information processing and handle complaints and remedies related to personal information.

[Privacy Officer]
• Name: Hojin Lee
• Position: CEO
• Email: contact@emelmujiro.com
• Phone: +82 10-7279-0380

Data subjects may direct all inquiries, complaints, and remedy requests related to personal information protection to the Privacy Officer.

remedies.title: Remedies for Rights Infringement
remedies.content:
Data subjects may contact the following organizations for dispute resolution or consultation regarding personal information infringement.

• Personal Information Infringement Report Center (KISA): 118 (no area code) / privacy.kisa.or.kr
• Personal Information Dispute Mediation Committee: 1833-6972 / www.kopico.go.kr
• Supreme Prosecutors' Office Cyber Investigation Division: 1301 (no area code) / www.spo.go.kr
• National Police Agency Cyber Bureau: 182 (no area code) / ecrm.police.go.kr

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated due to changes in law, policy, or services. Changes will be announced on the website at least 7 days in advance, or 30 days in advance for significant changes affecting user rights.
